sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114942" key="xrusopoii/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσο-ποιία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114942.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the making of gold,</tr_> Syn.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.61</biblScope> </bibl>B, Zos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.220B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.220B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
